people.name: Jack (Jonathan Masters Watson)
people.summary: Jack is an AI governance researcher focused on execution-time constraints for agentic AI systems. Creator of the 512 kernel — a minimal, byte-sized governance framework that enforces truthful execution at machine speed. His core thesis: "AI regulation is a speed-of-light problem" — any governance that relies on human review after the fact is physically too slow for agentic systems operating at millisecond latency....
